secure_storage.principle: All tokens and sensitive payloads encrypted at rest using platform-native keystores

android.fallback: If hardware keystore unavailable, use software-backed MasterKey with additional PIN/biometric gate

ios.protection_class: Complete protection when locked, available after first unlock
ios.sync_policy: kSecAttrSynchronizableNO — never synced to iCloud Keychain

flutter.mechanism: flutter_secure_storage (wraps Keychain on iOS, EncryptedSharedPreferences on Android)

unity.mechanism: Platform-specific: Android → EncryptedSharedPreferences via JNI bridge, iOS → Keychain via native plugin, Desktop → DPAPI (Windows) / Keychain (macOS)
unity.additional: PlayerPrefs MUST NOT be used for tokens — it is plaintext

web.mechanism: httpOnly secure cookies for tokens (set by gateway), IndexedDB with Web Crypto AES-GCM for offline message cache
web.note: Tokens never stored in localStorage or sessionStorage

sensitive.lifetime: Purged on logout, token revocation, or account deletion

internal.lifetime: Purged on logout or explicit user request

cached.lifetime: Purged on logout; evicted by LRU when cache exceeds 50 MB

reconnect_policy.trigger: WebSocket disconnect detected (close event, heartbeat miss, or network change)
reconnect_policy.token_check: Before each reconnect attempt, verify access_token validity; if expired, attempt refresh first
reconnect_policy.on_max_attempts_exceeded: Transition to 'disconnected' state, surface UI banner, stop retrying until explicit user action or network change event

foreground_resume.trigger: App resumes from background (onResume / applicationDidBecomeActive / OnApplicationFocus)
steps: 1. Check token expiry — if expired, attempt silent refresh
2. If refresh fails → transition to unauthenticated, show login prompt
4. On reconnect, send reconciliation request with last_event_sequence_id
5. Server responds with missed events since last_event_sequence_id
6. Client applies missed events in order, then resumes normal dispatch
foreground_resume.if_gap_too_large: Server returns 'full_sync_required' flag; client clears local cache and re-fetches

adjustments: Disable presence broadcasting (stop sending own presence updates)

network_quality_adaptation.detection: Monitor WebSocket round-trip latency on heartbeat responses

degraded.actions: Buffer non-critical events, reduce heartbeat frequency

poor.actions: Queue all outbound events, show degraded connection banner

offline_queue.description: When network is unavailable, outbound events are queued locally
offline_queue.replay_on_reconnect: Events replayed in order with original client_event_id for idempotent processing
offline_queue.expired_handling: Events older than TTL are discarded with warning callback

on_logout.reason: Deferred purge allows logout confirmation UI to complete before wiping

on_token_revocation.cascade: Transition to 'unauthenticated' state, clear offline queue (events can no longer be replayed without valid session)

immediate: ALL stored data — tokens, keys, caches, preferences, device_id
on_account_deletion.verification: After purge, read back all storage keys and assert empty

test_scenarios.name: token_survives_app_restart
test_scenarios.acceptance: Tokens available after cold restart without re-authentication

test_scenarios.name: logout_purges_all_sensitive_data
steps: Attempt to read all storage keys

test_scenarios.name: offline_queue_replayed_on_reconnect
steps: Verify all 10 messages delivered with correct order
test_scenarios.acceptance: All messages delivered, no duplicates, correct sequence

test_scenarios.name: background_to_foreground_reconciliation
test_scenarios.acceptance: All 50 missed events received via reconciliation, state consistent

test_scenarios.name: low_battery_reduces_overhead
steps: Observe heartbeat interval and presence broadcasting
test_scenarios.acceptance: Heartbeat interval increased to 60s, presence broadcasting disabled
